title: Pythia: CRISPR-Cas9 gRNA and microhomology repair template design tool
description: Web-based tool for designing CRISPR-Cas9 gRNAs and microhomology-based repair templates using deep-learning-predicted repair outcomes. Covers targeted transgene integration, single-nucleotide editing, and N/C-terminal gene tagging across any species, with pre-calculated genome-wide databases for Homo sapiens, Mus musculus, and Xenopus tropicalis.
